headline: Redesigning America's Digital Infrastructure
summary: Joe Gebbia, Airbnb co-founder and U.S. Chief Design Officer, and design pioneer Peter Arnell discuss their work with the National Design Studio, a newly formed federal initiative aimed at modernizing the United States government's digital infrastructure.

headline: Oppenheimer lifts Airbnb rating, sees ‘organic revenue levers materializing’
summary: Investing.com -- Oppenheimer upgraded Airbnb to Outperform from Perform and established a $180 price target on the stock in a note on Monday, arguing that a set of product initiatives and demand tailwinds are not fully reflected in current Street estimates.

headline: Oppenheimer Upgrades Airbnb to Outperform With $180 Price Target: Are Hotels and the World Cup About to Re-Rate the Stock?
summary: Oppenheimer analyst Jed Kelly upgraded Airbnb (NASDAQ:ABNB) stock to Outperform from Perform with a $180 price target on Monday. The thesis centers on product initiatives across Hotels expansion, Reserve Now Pay Later (RNPL), and artificial intelligence (AI) search driving durable revenue acceleration that Street estimates don’t fully reflect.
